headline: DFA to idle St. Albans VT plant; 80 workers affected
body: Dairy Farmers of America announced it will idle its St. Albans Vermont milk processing plant and close the adjoining St. Albans Creamery & Supply. Last day of operations is Aug. 17. Roughly 80 employees affected.

headline: Maola begins curtailing operations at Laurel MD ingredients plant
body: Maryland-Virginia Milk Producers Cooperative begins curtailing operations at its Laurel MD ingredients plant on June 1 2026 with full closure planned by December 31 2026. The plant primarily produced bulk ice cream mixes butter and dried milk powders.

headline: Leprino Foods to close Tracy CA mozzarella plant; 550 jobs
body: Leprino Foods will close its mozzarella plant in Tracy California by the end of 2025. The closure affects 550 jobs at what had been one of the world's largest mozzarella facilities.

headline: Danone to close Bridgeton NJ plant-based dairy factory; 114 layoffs
body: Danone will close its Bridgeton New Jersey facility on August 4 2026. The site produced soy oat and almond milks for the Silk brand and oat milk and dairy-free creamers for So Delicious. About 114 employees affected.

headline: Historic New Britain CT dairy plant to close; 205 layoffs planned
body: Dairy Farmers of America announced the closure of its historic New Britain Connecticut milk plant which DFA acquired in 2012. The closure involves 205 planned layoffs.

headline: Leprino Foods nears full capacity at new Lubbock TX cheese plant
body: Leprino Foods' new Lubbock Texas manufacturing facility approaches full operational capacity in late summer 2026 with two cheese production lines that will process up to 8 million pounds of milk per day.

headline: Chobani investing $500M to expand Twin Falls ID plant by 500K sqft
body: Chobani is investing $500 million to expand its Twin Falls Idaho plant adding over 500000 square feet and boosting production capacity by 50 percent. The plant manufactures yogurt oat milk and coffee creamers. Operations expected to start early 2026.

headline: Walmart opens third milk processing plant in Robinson TX
body: Walmart opened its third milk processing facility in Robinson Texas representing more than $350 million in investment. The plant is part of Walmart's vertical integration of its milk supply.

headline: AMPI converting Blair WI cheddar plant to high-capacity cottage cheese
body: Associated Milk Producers Inc will convert its cheddar cheese production facility in Blair Wisconsin to a high-capacity cottage cheese plant in 2026.

headline: Wisconsin Whey Protein building new WPI plant at Darlington
body: Wisconsin Whey Protein is building a new whey protein isolate plant at its Darlington Wisconsin facility expected to open in early 2026 and produce nearly 6000 metric tons of WPI per year.

headline: Meister Cheese begins construction on new make facility
body: Meister Cheese Company is beginning construction on an all-new make facility to grow 150 percent. Scheduled for completion in summer 2027.

headline: Kraft Heinz Lowville NY plant ending Kraft and Polly-O string cheese production
body: Kraft Heinz announced that its Lowville New York plant will stop producing Kraft and Polly-O string cheese effective November 28 2024. The facility — the country's largest cream cheese plant — will continue producing Philadelphia Cream Cheese.

headline: Kerry Group acquires Kraft Heinz B2B powdered cheese business for $107.5M
body: Kraft Heinz agreed to sell its B2B powdered cheese manufacturing business to Kerry Group for $107.5 million. The deal includes the Albany Minnesota powdered cheese plant and its 62 employees who transferred to Kerry. The plant continues operating under Kerry ownership making B2B ingredients for snack and food manufacturers.
